query: SELECT id, location, reportType, reportDate, totalScore, status, DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as created, JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.submitterName') as submitter, JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.submittedVia') as submitted_via, JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.weekOfStart') as week_start, JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.weekOfEnd') as week_end FROM report_submissions WHERE reportDate = '2026-03-03' ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4hPncfDS8MBAb.4e1326b24a82 --database i5zcri4CVdStBBckDWTaVK --execute SELECT id, location, reportType, reportDate, totalScore, status, DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as created, JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.submitterName') as submitter, JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.submittedVia') as submitted_via, JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.weekOfStart') as week_start, JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.weekOfEnd') as week_end FROM report_submissions WHERE reportDate = '2026-03-03' ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
